# Ingantt Help — English

> Documentation for Ingantt, a project scheduling application.

## Getting Started

- [Overview](https://help.ingantt.com/en/getting-started/overview/index.md)
- [Getting Started](https://help.ingantt.com/en/getting-started/getting-started/index.md)
- [Create with AI](https://help.ingantt.com/en/getting-started/create-with-ai/index.md)
- [Import & Export](https://help.ingantt.com/en/getting-started/import-export/index.md)

## Setting Up Your Project

- [Project Properties](https://help.ingantt.com/en/setting-up-project/project/index.md)

## Building a Schedule

- [Tasks](https://help.ingantt.com/en/building-schedule/tasks/index.md)

- [Dependencies](https://help.ingantt.com/en/building-schedule/dependencies/index.md)
- [Constraints](https://help.ingantt.com/en/building-schedule/constraints/index.md)
- [Resources](https://help.ingantt.com/en/building-schedule/resources/index.md)
- [Assignments](https://help.ingantt.com/en/building-schedule/assignments/index.md)
